rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Walk-away test (M2+).
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Rule scoped M2+; this is M1 (joyful-creation, student-stays-engaged). Walk-away trust distance ramps from M2.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: 50% magic rule (M3-M8).
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Portfolio-level rule (which modules carry holy-shit moments); cannot be judged from a single M1 file. M1's mood target is joyful-creation, consistent with a supporting/functional beat.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Trust the agentic design — no human backstops.
Quality ladder.
One exercise = one bounded activity.
Modules composable across variants.
Three-level completeness.
Pattern-recognition LOs need n>=2 instances with contrast.
Progression-with-variations is the spine.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Cross-module move-variation judgment (same move different face across modules) needs the module set; not visible in a single M1 file. Module file names the M1 instance of compound/close moves.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Student agency — adults decide.
Delegation — student brings, Claude screens.
Split mega-exercise when phases = distinct skills + distinct artifacts.
Artifact-realism check.
Teach principle + technique — default.
Auto-fire sim+eval after significant rewrite.
Forcing functions stay, scripted reactions go.
Corporate infra = nice-to-have, never forcing function.
Personal-first, team promotion via human conversation.
Measure silent failure, not just friction.
Don't pre-set categories before experiment runs.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Generation-process rule (drafting categories from what happened in the experiment); not an attribute of the shipped module file.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Verification layers sample DIFFERENT error distributions.
Cheap-before-expensive verification ordering.
Rule in memory without forcing function = worse than no rule.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Compounding-process rule (memory entry must be wired to a forcing function at ship); not a property of this student-facing module file.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Short skeptical pushback on 'done' = re-verify trigger.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Author/agent behavior rule (re-verify on skeptical pushback); not a module-file attribute.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Cohort execution is trainer-paced + concurrent, not sequential.
Host-skill optional; maintainer blocks trainer-only.
Reflection beats: in-chat over file-write.
Classroom = default delivery; body teaches work, trainer manages room.
Eval = fixed yardstick; thing measured learns.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Eval-loop integrity rule (scorer stays fixed across rounds); no eval/scoring loop is taught in this M1 module. Closer/measured-thing mechanics arrive in later modules.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Reading burden for verification = banned. Claude audits Claude.
Self-report + self-audit charity — verify at artifact.
Offered structures need forced-engagement mechanic.
Source-type blindness on ingestion.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Heterogeneous-source ingestion / slide-extraction-depth rule; this M1 module ingests no source folder. Not applicable to this surface.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Task selection drives outcome → name floor AND ceiling.
Maintainer-block hedge naming section's own failure mode = cut-signal.
Audience tier determines authoring substrate.
Verification machinery needs smoke-test before trust.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Build-then-smoke-test rule for verification machinery (hooks, judges, loops); no such machinery is built in this M1 module. MCP connector install is a use, not authored machinery.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Context-loading tiers as staged progression.
Removals are strategic — ask before cutting.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Generation-step rule (pause-and-ask before cutting a named entity); not a property of the shipped file.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Symmetric visible-mechanics > runtime fork when dual-runtime constraints break agentic move.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Dual-runtime fork-vs-symmetric rule scoped to Agents-101-class multi-runtime delivery; AE101 ships CLI + Desktop with no Cowork fork and no runtime-divergent agentic move in this module.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Load-bearing platform feature = no fallback. Gate or redesign.
Eval architecture — partition by evidence source, not criterion count.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Eval-system architecture rule (judge granularity, sim-trace partition); governs the eval harness, not a student-facing module file.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Plug points + UX.
Per-exercise leap test — 3 observable Monday outcomes.
Per-phase failure mode + escape hatch.
Heavy fan-out prompts get body recovery callout.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No heavy fan-out prompt (parallel subagents, read-the-world, multi-file rewrite) ships in this module file; the orient/introspect/fix/compound/close loop is single-track. Fan-out arrives in later modules (M4 audit subagent).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Save belongs with authoring, not loading.
Convenience-driven prompts with known shape-bias → body acknowledgment callout.
Deliberate-antipattern prompts = class-judge exempt, flagged-by-design.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No deliberate-antipattern (before-shot / un-packaged baseline) prompt in this module file; the inlined prompts live in the linked exercise files, not here. M1 is a joyful-creation first-loop, not a before/after contrast.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Session widget — shape; place by learning flow.
Widgets carry semantics, not just emphasis.
Pre-action framing doesn't preview prompt's payoff.
Engineer-audience audit fixes default to body callout, not forcing function.
Multi-session (any new mechanic mid-arc) ships as packaging, not new primitive.
/clear = tool, not ceremony.
Inbound links preserve pedagogical beat across reference restructuring.
Scan at the unit the rule names, not convenient larger one.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Auditor-process rule (scan at the rule's named unit); governs how this very judge applies rules, not a content attribute of the file.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Verify mechanism before proposing surgery.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Generation-process rule (trace happy path before proposing SKILL/tool change); not a property of the shipped module file.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Acting on a flagged item — verify before fixing; prescribed fix is a hypothesis.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Author/auditor-process rule (discriminate before acting on a flagged punchlist item); not a content attribute of the file.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Callouts next to prompts: steer, don't pre-empt.
Persistent TODO surfaces stale by default — audit before acting.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Punchlist-hygiene process rule (verify TODO bullets undone before acting); governs work against pre-cohort-todos.md, not the module file content.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Maintainer blocks point, don't restate. Link architecture doc where they touch delivery.
